title: Safely Drain a Node
text:
This page shows how to safely drain a
node
,
optionally respecting the PodDisruptionBudget you have defined.

This task assumes that you have met the following prerequisites:
You do not require your applications to be highly available during the
node drain, or
You have read about the
PodDisruptionBudget
concept,
and have
configured PodDisruptionBudgets
for
applications that need them.
